title: Sanding Discs 150mm 100 Pcs, 80/120/220/320/400 Grit 6 inch 6 Holes Hook and Loop Orbital Sander Discs, Sanding Pads for Random Orbital Sander Pads and All Oscillating Tools
features: 【100pcs of Sanding Disc】Each box has 100pcs of 150mm sanding discs. They are 80/120/220/320/400 - grit, suitable for various grinding jobs. The 6 - inch orbital sander pads have 6 holes. The holes reduce heat and improve dust extraction, making the work area cleaner and prolonging the yellow sanding disc' life. Ideal for professionals and DIYers.

【Features a Three - layer Design】 The high - quality alumina abrasive layer offers excellent grinding efficiency, cutting materials smoothly. The thick paper backing provides support and its flexibility fits workpiece contours, enhancing grinding. It's reliable for long - term use. The nylon fastener makes installation and removal easy. This sandpaper discs combines performance and convenience, ideal for grinding tasks.

【Nylon Hook - and - Loop Backing Pad】Our sanding paper discs's backing pad is excellent. It's easy to attach/remove, saving time. The nylon ensures strong adhesion during grinding, keeping the sanding disk stable. Quick replacement is possible, enhancing efficiency and reducing downtime. Ideal for pros and DIYers, it offers a reliable sanding experience.

【Safety Tips】Our sanding discs pads perform well, but safety is key. Wear hearing, eye, and respiratory protection and gloves to avoid noise, debris, dust, and hand injuries. Store hook & loop discs away from sunlight and water to maintain quality. Your safety and 6-inch round hook and loop sanding discs durability are our priorities.

【Wide Application】Our assorted grit sanding pads can work on a wide range of surfaces. They are recommended to work on wood/metal parts and surfaces, but they can also be used on non-metal surfaces and handle a variety of abrasives, in particular, grinding, deburring, polishing and derusting.
description: From the brand Previous page Our brand in sandpaper was founded by a passionate craftsman. In his workshop, he toiled to create top-notch sandpapers. In his workshop, he invented production methods. Local recognition gave the impetus for further development. We built a team, expanded the product line and achieved a leading position in the market.
